char_overview: Spent fifteen years as a 游魂 in the American Southwest before returning to Japan.
char_looks: 185cm Disheveled short gray hair Red eyes, half-lidded. White shirt, brown vest, worn boots. Red bandana. 朱殷, paired six-shot revolvers, a fixed blade mounted beneath each barrel. Within blood mist, chambers auto-load blood bullets.
char_flaws: Shirks all admin; Reckless to self-destruction.; Takes pulse when bored.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-猩红迷雾: Releases blood mist by cutting skin. The mist extends his circulatory system, pulsing with his heartbeat. Within it: instant translocation, blood-forged weaponry, 360-degree perception. Blood and 灵力 convert bidirectionally; dissipates when wounds seal or 灵力 exhausts.
char_mission: Push every fight to its limit, leave command duties to others.
char_origin: Born in Osaka, moved to the US as a child, awakened at 14 in Arizona. Spent fifteen years as a 游魂 in the American Southwest. Returned at 29, joined at 32, 色彩阶 at 36, 狩灵协会2科 director.

char_relationships.左恕: Paperwork he pushes away, she handles, duties he shirks, she shoulders. In blood mist, she commands and he becomes the weapon. Neither says it aloud, 狩灵协会2科 functions because of her.
